creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
Created attachment 231103
Patch to upgrade to MySQL 8.0.28

MySQL 8.0.28 is scheduled for tomorrow but I found the file here:

https://cdn.mysql.com//Downloads/MySQL-8.0/mysql-boost-8.0.28.tar.gz

ChangeLog is here:

https://docs.oracle.com/cd/E17952_01/mysql-8.0-relnotes-en/news-8-0-28.html
